# Oddpeel

> Oddpeel is a direct-to-consumer sock brand. We make bold, comfortable
> statement socks for people who "peel the boring." Tagline: "Weird looks good." /
> "Oddly perfect." / 奇怪的刚刚好。

## About
- Combed-cotton crew socks with reinforced heel & toe, US sizes 6–13.
- Patterns designed in-house and knitted (not printed) so colors last.
- Free US shipping over $35, 30-day happiness guarantee, carbon-neutral delivery.
- Plastic-free packaging; fair-wage, audited knitting partners.

## Pages
- Home: https://www.oddpeel.com/
- Shop all socks: https://www.oddpeel.com/shop.html
- Our story: https://www.oddpeel.com/about.html
- Contact & FAQ: https://www.oddpeel.com/contact.html

## Contact
- Customer help: help@oddpeel.com
- Wholesale: wholesale@oddpeel.com
- Press & collabs: hello@oddpeel.com
